name: Chumbak
overview: Rohan Awasthi is a well known gynecologist, who is happily married to Supriya. Everything is going well in his life, except when a sexy female patient, Zarine enters his life and turns his whole world upside down. Rohan becomes obsessed with Zarine and feels a magnetic attraction that he cannot understand and fathom.

trailers.title: Chumbak | Official Trailer | Satrangii | Releasing On : 03rd November | Exclusively On Atrangii App
